etymology.description: Depicts a sun (日) above three humans (㐺) -> sun modified to resemble a horizontal eye (early form of 目) -> a crowd under someone’s gaze -> final form resembles 罒.
etymology.interpretation: The character 乑 is derived from 眾(众) (zhòng, "multitude"), symbolizing a crowd gathered under the gaze of the sun, reinterpreted as the eye of authority overseeing a collective group, representing the concept of 'together' or 'gathered'.
